title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-4, Gemma 3, Mistral, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with a simple async/sync API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama: chat, completion, embeddings, tool-calling and JSON mode support.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama: chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: OllamaSharp
summary: .NET/C# client for Ollama with async streaming, chat and embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for Ollama: chat, generate, pull, list, delete models.

title: ollama-cli (go)
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Go; browse, chat and manage models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like plugin powered by Ollama models for in-editor code completion.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling options.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & CUDA) for Ollama with one-line run instructions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for Ollama: RAG, function-calling, fine-tune, LangGraph, LlamaIndex examples.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot template using Ollama + Chroma for private RAG on PDFs and text.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats via Ollama with slash commands and model switching.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run Ollama models inside notes for summarization, translation and Q&A.

title: ollama-npm (unofficial)
summary: Lightweight community npm wrapper around Ollama REST API with TypeScript types.

title: ollama-pypi (unofficial helpers)
summary: Collection of helper utilities and extra embeddings for Ollama not in the official package.

title: r/ollama - Reddit community
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, troubleshooting, integrations and feature requests around Ollama.
